message:
Here's something wild: a dog's tail wag isn't just "happy" or "not happy" — the DIRECTION matters. 🐾 Studies found dogs tend to wag more to their right side when they feel good (like seeing their favorite human!) and more to the left when they're unsure or nervous. Other dogs can actually read these tiny differences. Your pup is basically holding a whole conversation with that tail. 🐕

Comment 🐾 if your dog's entire back end wags when you walk in!
